question: Will the divorcing parties settle the property split out of court?

requirements.claim_or_quantity: If the parties reach a binding agreement on property division without a court order by 2023-06-01, outcome is settle_out_of_court; otherwise court_adjudication.
requirements.why_relevant: the terminal outcome standing as of the question date sets the base rate
high-sensitivity latent (0.90) driving the outcome distribution
high-sensitivity latent (0.90) driving the outcome distribution
high-sensitivity latent (0.80) driving the outcome distribution
a fact that reweights competing structural hypotheses materially changes the outcome
institutional rules determine which actions are feasible and when the outcome resolves

retrieval_traces.logical_query: divorcing parties settle property split court party A party B attorney A after:2022-09-04 before:2023-02-01
